_meta.disclaimer: Solicitor-reviewed audit preparation template. Audit has not yet run. Controlled/synthetic audit exists separately.
_meta.pdf_layout_type: e.g. native_text | poor_ocr | rotated_scan | index_only | mixed_defendants
_meta.controlled_audit_note: Separate 253-case controlled audit is not a substitute for this review.

case_overview.main_issue_for_review: One sentence — what disclosure/evidence pressure matters most

evidence_items.evidence_type: mg11 | mg5 | mg6c | bwv | cctv | custody_pace | interview | phone_digital | encro | forensic_medical | id | exhibit_index | other
evidence_items.source_reference: e.g. MG11 p.12 | MG6C/BWV line 4 | Index item 7
evidence_items.evidence_state: served | referred_only | missing | incomplete | not_safely_confirmed | inferred_only | other_defendant_only
evidence_items.expected_chase_item: Optional short chase label if chase_needed
must_not_say: Optional phrases that must not be stated as fact from this item
evidence_items.source_hierarchy_note: Optional — e.g. MG5 summary only; MG11 not served

global_chase_items: Cross-item chase labels not tied to one row
do_not_overstate_global: Case-level warnings for any output surface
blocking_concerns: Optional — e.g. false attribution risk, co-def bleed, safe line without source
